pages.text: Those rabble-like Enderling have disappointed you greatly. You suddenly remembered that in the End Eternity there is a big one, whose power far exceeds those Ender spirits, and having it join your side might be a very good idea.

In battle, the Endersent servant will raise its arms to strike enemies, confuse opponents with its teleportation, and summon guardians. However, there is one thing that puzzles you — the Endersents you summon do not have special "eyes" like the named Endersents you encountered before. Perhaps there are ways to give them those abilities.
Summon an Endersent servant through a complex ritual.
Endersent servants will fight for you with powerful attacks.
